# QECTOR Decoder 3 full context

QECTOR Decoder 3 is a Python and Rust quantum error correction decoder package by Guillaume Lessard / iD01t Productions.

## Primary pages

- https://qector.store/
- https://qector.store/decoder
- https://qector.store/installer
- https://qector.store/docs
- https://qector.store/technical-reference
- https://qector.store/workbench
- https://qector.store/benchmarks
- https://qector.store/license
- https://qector.store/pricing
- https://qector.store/commercial
- https://qector.store/about
- https://qector.store/contact

## External records

- https://pypi.org/project/qector-decoder-v3/
- https://github.com/GuillaumeLessard/qector-decoder
- https://github.com/GuillaumeLessard/qector-decoder (artifacts, validation, code)

## Public install

pip install qector-decoder-v3

## Verification command

python -c "from qector_decoder_v3 import UnionFindDecoder, BlossomDecoder; print('QECTOR OK')"
